description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat, terracotta-colored gable roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior features a mix of white and dark panels, with large vertical and horizontal windows providing ample natural light. Balconies with glass railings and greenery are present on the upper floors, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The house is surrounded by several trees and has a gated entryway with a driveway. A spacious terrace and multiple outdoor living spaces are visible, enhancing the connection between indoor and outdoor environments. The overall design emphasizes straight lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and synthetic materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a terracotta gable roof, large windows, balconies, and a mix of white and dark exterior panels, surrounded by trees and featuring a gated entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing a dark facade, a terrace with railing, and two trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, tall vertical windows, and a balcony with glass railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple balconies with greenery, large windows, and a prominent gated driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of dark and white panels, vertical windows, and a visible balcony with outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entryway with a terrace, modern door, and minimal decorative elements
